title: Better Sniffers
description: Makes the sniffers more interesting by having them dig up a whole bunch of different items
body:
We all know sniffers are quite underwhelming, especially for how hard they are to get. This data pack adds a whole bunch of new items to their loot table:

- Raw ores
- All other types of seeds
- Carrots, potatoes
- Bones, sticks, rotten flesh, bricks, charcoal
- All types of pottery sherds
- Diamonds
- Nautilus shells
- Spore blossoms
- Relic music disc
- Host, raiser, shaper and wayfinder armor trims
- Diamond armor
- Diamond pickaxe and sword
- Sniffer eggs
- Golden dandelion
